query:
SELECT
            d.id,
            d.name,
            d.description,
            d.architecture,
            d.archived,
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*)
                FROM release_packages rp
                JOIN release r ON r.id = rp.release_id
                WHERE r.distribution_id = d.id
                  AND r.version = '1.0.0'
            )::int AS num_packages
        FROM distribution d
        WHERE d.id = $1
